hannina:Maozhibaozang.NAME: Cat's Treasure
hannina:Maozhibaozang.FLAVOR: The cat's treasure has always been by her side.
DESCRIPTIONS: Card reward options increased by 1. NL At the end of combat, gain #b9 #yGold .

hannina:Xiantuanniudanji.NAME: Yarn Gacha Machine
hannina:Xiantuanniudanji.FLAVOR: So special it only dispenses yarn balls.

hannina:PToy.NAME: P Doll
hannina:PToy.FLAVOR: Rarely used because she hugs the real person to sleep at night.
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you lose #yGold in combat, gain #b1 #yGold and #b3 #yVigor .

hannina:Chuchanling.NAME: Livestock Spirit
hannina:Chuchanling.FLAVOR: That's exactly why she got this figure.
DESCRIPTIONS: Upon pickup, remove 1 Strike from your deck and gain #b4 Max HP.

hannina:Gangqi.NAME: Aura of Steel: Heart
DESCRIPTIONS: When #yVigor is consumed, gain Block equal to the amount of #yVigor consumed / 2. NL When you Exhaust Curse and Status cards, gain 1 #yPlated #yArmor .

hannina:Miaodan.NAME: Tiger Meow Bomb
DESCRIPTIONS: For the first 4 turns of each combat, gain 5 #yVigor and add 1 Pride into your hand each turn. When Super Kitty Scratch is added to your hand, gain 10 #yVigor .

hannina:Qinmihezhao.NAME: Intimate Photo
hannina:Qinmihezhao.FLAVOR: Taken 50 years ago, when the cat was only 50 years old.
DESCRIPTIONS: The first time you enter any #yForm each turn, gain [E] .

hannina:Jibeilongdehuiyi.NAME: Memory of the Spined Dragon
hannina:Jibeilongdehuiyi.FLAVOR: Sweet memories of the first time we met.
DESCRIPTIONS: When entering Ironclad Cat #yForm , gain 1 #yStrength this turn. NL When entering Silent Cat #yForm , gain 1 #yDexterity this turn. NL When entering Defect Cat #yForm , gain 1 #yFocus this turn.

hannina:Jibeilongdehuiyi2.NAME: Memory of the Spined Dragon
hannina:Jibeilongdehuiyi2.FLAVOR: Sweet memories of the first time we met.
DESCRIPTIONS: When entering any #yForm , gain #b1 #yStrength , #b1 #yDexterity , and #b1 #yFocus this turn.

hannina:Maozhizhencang.NAME: Cat's Collection
hannina:Maozhizhencang.FLAVOR: The cat's collection has always been behind her.
DESCRIPTIONS: Upon pickup, gain #b400 #yGold . NL At the end of combat, gain #b15 Gold. NL Card reward options increased by 1.
